name: Leshan Giantstar Farming & Husbandry Corporation Limited
summary: Leshan Giantstar Farming & Husbandry Corporation Limited engages in the research, production, and sale of leather and leather products in China. The company offers car seat, upholstery bag, furniture, and decorative leather products. It also operates online store for its products. The company was formerly known as Sichuan Zhenjing Corporation Limited and changed its name to Leshan Giantstar Farming & Husbandry Corporation in August 2020. Leshan Giantstar Farming & Husbandry Corporation was founded in 1993 and is based in Leshan, China.
